mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_risk_assessment_detail WHERE risk_id = #{riskId} ORDER BY risk_idx ASC
SELECT * FROM tb_risk_assessment_detail WHERE risk_id = #{riskId} AND major_category = #{majorCategory} ORDER BY risk_idx ASC
SELECT * FROM tb_risk_assessment_detail WHERE risk_id = #{riskId} AND risk_score >= #{minScore} ORDER BY risk_score DESC
SELECT * FROM tb_risk_assessment_detail WHERE risk_id = #{riskId} AND is_registered = 1 ORDER BY risk_idx ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_risk_assessment_detail ( risk_id, activity_process_id, risk_idx, major_category, detail_action, risk_4m, danger, expected_disaster, target, current_safety_measures, possibility_grade, result_grade, risk_score, risk_grade, is_registered, reduction_measures, improved_possibility_grade, improved_result_grade, improved_risk_score, improved_risk_grade, created_at ) VALUES ( #{riskId}, #{activityProcessId}, #{riskIdx}, #{majorCategory}, #{detailAction}, #{risk4M}, #{danger}, #{expectedDisaster}, #{target}, #{currentSafetyMeasures}, #{possibilityGrade}, #{resultGrade}, #{riskScore}, #{riskGrade}, #{isRegistered}, #{reductionMeasures}, #{improvedPossibilityGrade}, #{improvedResultGrade}, #{improvedRiskScore}, #{improvedRiskGrade}, GETDATE() )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_risk_assessment_detail SET activity_process_id = #{activityProcessId}, risk_idx = #{riskIdx}, major_category = #{majorCategory}, detail_action = #{detailAction}, risk_4m = #{risk4M}, danger = #{danger}, expected_disaster = #{expectedDisaster}, target = #{target}, current_safety_measures = #{currentSafetyMeasures}, possibility_grade = #{possibilityGrade}, result_grade = #{resultGrade}, risk_score = #{riskScore}, risk_grade = #{riskGrade}, is_registered = #{isRegistered}, reduction_measures = #{reductionMeasures}, improved_possibility_grade = #{improvedPossibilityGrade}, improved_result_grade = #{improvedResultGrade}, improved_risk_score = #{improvedRiskScore}, improved_risk_grade = #{improvedRiskGrade} WHERE id = #{id}
